[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  72 def get_content_hash(filepath):                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  73     """Generate SHA256 hash for a file's content."""                  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  74     sha256 = hashlib.sha256()                                         │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  75     try:                                                              │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  76         with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:                               │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  77             while chunk := f.read(8192):                              │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  78                 sha256.update(chunk)                                  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  79         return sha256.hexdigest()                                     │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  80     except (IOError, OSError):                                        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  81         return None                                                   │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  82                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  83 def analyze_semantic_similarity(pythons_dir):                         │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  84     """Performs semantic similarity analysis on Python scripts."""    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  85                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  86     # Get all Python files                                            │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  87     all_python_files = sorted([str(f) for f in                        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     Path(pythons_dir).rglob('*.py') if f.is_file()])                      │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  88                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  89     if not all_python_files:                                          │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  90         print("No Python files found for analysis.")                  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  91         return                                                        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  92                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  93     print(f"Found {len(all_python_files)} Python files. Extracting    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     features and analyzing similarity (this may take a while)...")        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  94                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  95     script_data = []                                                  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  96     corpus = [] # For TF-IDF                                          │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  97                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  98     # Extract features and build corpus                               │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │  99     for i, filepath in enumerate(all_python_files):                   │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 100         if i % 100 == 0:                                              │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 101             print(f"  Processed {i}/{len(all_python_files)} files..." │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     )                                                                     │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 102                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 103         features, content = extract_features_from_script(filepath)    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 104                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 105         # Create a text representation of features for TF-IDF         │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 106         feature_text = " ".join(list(features["imports"]) + list      │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     (features["functions"]) + list(features["classes"]))                  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 107         if features["docstring"]:                                     │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 108             feature_text += " " + features["docstring"]               │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 109         corpus.append(feature_text)                                   │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 110                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 111         script_data.append({                                          │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 112             'filepath': filepath,                                     │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 113             'features': features,                                     │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 114             'feature_text': feature_text,                             │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 115             'content': content # Keep content for more robust         │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     comparison later if needed                                            │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 116         })                                                            │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 117                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 118     if not corpus:                                                    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 119         print("No meaningful features extracted from scripts for      │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     comparison.")                                                         │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 120         return                                                        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 121                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 122     # Use TF-IDF and Cosine Similarity for semantic comparison        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 123     vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer(stop_words='english', min_df=1)      │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 124     tfidf_matrix = vectorizer.fit_transform(corpus)                   │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 125                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 126     print("\nCalculating cosine similarities (this may take a while   │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     for many files)...")                                                  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 127     cosine_sim_matrix = cosine_similarity(tfidf_matrix)               │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 128                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 129     # Group similar scripts                                           │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 130     similarity_threshold = 0.8 # Threshold for considering two        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     scripts "similar"                                                     │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 131                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 132     # Use content hash to quickly group exact duplicates first        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 133     exact_duplicates = defaultdict(list)                              │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 134     for data in script_data:                                          │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 135         file_hash = get_content_hash(data['filepath'])                │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 136         if file_hash:                                                 │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 137             exact_duplicates[file_hash].append(data['filepath'])      │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 138                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 139     # Filter out exact duplicates for semantic grouping to focus on   │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     *similar* unique files                                                │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 140     processed_files = set()                                           │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 141     semantic_groups = []                                              │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 142                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 143     for i in range(len(script_data)):                                 │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 144         if script_data[i]['filepath'] in processed_files:             │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 145             continue                                                  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 146                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 147         current_group = [script_data[i]['filepath']]                  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 148         processed_files.add(script_data[i]['filepath'])               │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 149                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 150         for j in range(i + 1, len(script_data)):                      │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 151             if script_data[j]['filepath'] in processed_files:         │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 152                 continue                                              │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 153                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 154             if cosine_sim_matrix[i, j] >= similarity_threshold:       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 155                 current_group.append(script_data[j]['filepath'])      │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 156                 processed_files.add(script_data[j]['filepath'])       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 157                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 158         if len(current_group) > 1: # Only add groups with more than   │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     one similar script                                                    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 159             semantic_groups.append(current_group)                     │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 160                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 161     print("\n--- Semantic Similarity Analysis Results ---")           │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 162     print(f"Total Python files analyzed: {len(all_python_files)}")    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 163     print(f"Number of exact duplicate groups found (via content       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     hash): {len([g for g in exact_duplicates.values() if len(g) > 1])}")  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 164     print(f"Number of semantically similar groups found (above        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     similarity threshold {similarity_threshold}): {len(semantic_groups)}" │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     )                                                                     │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 165                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 166     # Display some exact duplicates (can be huge, limit for display)  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 167     if len([g for g in exact_duplicates.values() if len(g) > 1]) > 0: │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 168         print("\n--- Example Exact Duplicate Groups ---")             │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 169         exact_display_count = 0                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 170         for file_hash, group in exact_duplicates.items():             │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 171             if len(group) > 1:                                        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 172                 exact_display_count += 1                              │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 173                 print(f"\nExact Duplicate Group (Hash: {file_hash[:8  │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     ]}...):")                                                             │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 174                 for f in group[:5]: # Show first 5                    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 175                     print(f"  - {f}")                                 │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 176                 if len(group) > 5:                                    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 177                     print(f"  ... and {len(group) - 5} more.")        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 178             if exact_display_count >= 5: # Limit to 5 exact groups    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 179                 break                                                 │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 180                                                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 181     # Display some semantic groups                                    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 182     if len(semantic_groups) > 0:                                      │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 183         print("\n--- Example Semantically Similar Groups ---")        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 184         semantic_display_count = 0                                    │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 185         for group in semantic_groups:                                 │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 186             semantic_display_count += 1                               │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 187             print(f"\nSemantically Similar Group (Similarity >=       │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     {similarity_threshold}):")                                            │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 188             for f in group[:5]: # Show first 5                        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 189                 print(f"  - {f}")                                     │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 190             if len(group) > 5:                                        │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 191                 print(f"  ... and {len(group) - 5} more.")            │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 192             if semantic_display_count >= 5: # Limit to 5 semantic     │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     groups                                                                │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 193                 break                                                 │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 194     else:                                                             │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │ 195         print("\nNo semantically similar groups found at this         │
[12/01/2025, 14:36:41] │     threshold.")                                                          │

[12/01/2025, 14:36:46]   groups of semantically similar scripts. It will first group exact

[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │  6 def get_file_metadata(directory):                                      │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │  7     """Generates a dictionary of {relative_path: (size, hash)} for     │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │    files in a directory."""                                               │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │  8     metadata = {}                                                      │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │  9     for root, _, files in os.walk(directory):                          │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 10         for name in files:                                             │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 11             file_path = Path(root) / name                              │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 12             if file_path.is_file():                                    │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 13                 try:                                                   │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 14                     rel_path = file_path.relative_to(directory)        │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 15                     size = file_path.stat().st_size                    │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 16                     # Hashing can be slow for large directories, so    │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │    use size as primary, hash for content check                            │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 17                     # For a quick comparison, we'll only hash if sizes │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │    differ, or if explicitly requested.                                    │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 18                     # For now, we'll just use size as a proxy for      │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │    "different" if names match.                                            │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 19                     metadata[str(rel_path)] = size                     │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 20                 except Exception as e:                                 │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 21                     print(f"Error getting metadata for {file_path}:    │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │    {e}")                                                                  │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 22     return metadata                                                    │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 23                                                                        │

[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 33         print(f"Error: Directory '{dir2_path}' does not exist.")       │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 34         return                                                         │

[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 43                                                                        │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 44     files_in_both_different_size = []                                  │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 45     files_in_both_same_size = []                                       │
[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 46                                                                        │

[12/01/2025, 14:48:37] │ 48         size1 = metadata1[rel_path]                                    │
